title: Tinkers' Advanced-Materials
description: A mod adding integrations with tech mod for TConstruct.
body:
Tinkers' Advanced-Materials is a Tinkers' Construct Addon adding a plenty of powerful materials (Mainly integrations across Technological mods).
If you are a fan of technological material with unique traits, TiAcMe might be a good choice.

Current integration mods:
- Thermal Series
- Thermal Endergy
- Mekanism
- Applied Energetic
- PnC:R
- Create Utilities
- Create: Rainbow Compound

Requires [Tinkers' Advanced Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-advanced-core)

![Integrations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac4110df9ebb658c1879a47d1483737009fd91e4.png)

Integrations can be toggled in _tinkers_advanced_core-common.toml_ config, modifier behaviour can be tweaked in _tinkers_advanced_materials-common.toml_ config.
